CVE-2025-30192.title: An attacker spoofing answers to ECS enabled requests sent out by  ...
CVE-2025-30192.description:
An attacker spoofing answers to ECS enabled requests sent out by the Recursor has a chance of success higher than non-ECS enabled queries.

The updated version include various mitigations against spoofing attempts of ECS enabled queries by chaining ECS enabled requests and enforcing stricter validation of the received answers.

The most strict mitigation done when the new setting outgoing.edns_subnet_harden (old style name edns-subnet-harden) is enabled.

CVE-2025-30195.title: An attacker can publish a zone containing specific Resource Recor ...
CVE-2025-30195.description:
An attacker can publish a zone containing specific Resource Record Sets. Processing and caching results for these sets can lead to an illegal memory accesses and crash of the Recursor, causing a denial of service.

The remedy is: upgrade to the patched 5.2.1 version.

We would like to thank Volodymyr Ilyin for bringing this issue to our attention.

CVE-2025-59029.title: An attacker can trigger an assertion failure by requesting crafte ...
CVE-2025-59029.description: An attacker can trigger an assertion failure by requesting crafted DNS records, waiting for them to be inserted into the records cache, then send a query with qtype set to ANY.

CVE-2025-59030.title: An attacker can trigger the removal of cached records by sending  ...
CVE-2025-59030.description: An attacker can trigger the removal of cached records by sending a NOTIFY query over TCP.

CVE-2026-0398.description: Crafted zones can lead to increased resource usage and crafted CNAME chains can lead to cache poisoning in Recursor.

CVE-2026-24027.description: Crafted zones can lead to increased incoming network traffic.

CVE-2026-33256.title: An attacker can send a web request that causes unlimited memory a ...
CVE-2026-33256.description: An attacker can send a web request that causes unlimited memory allocation in the internal web server, leading to a denial of service. The internal web server is disabled by default.

CVE-2026-33257.description: An attacker can send a web request that causes unlimited memory allocation in the internal web server, leading to a denial of service. The internal web server is disabled by default.

CVE-2026-33258.title: By publishing and querying a crafted zone an attacker can cause a ...
CVE-2026-33258.description: By publishing and querying a crafted zone an attacker can cause allocation of large entries in the negative and aggressive NSEC(3) caches.

CVE-2026-33259.title: Having many concurrent transfers of the same RPZ can lead to inco ...
CVE-2026-33259.description: Having many concurrent transfers of the same RPZ can lead to inconsistent RPZ data, use after free and/or a crash of the recursor. Normally concurrent transfers of the same RPZ zone can only occur with a malfunctioning RPZ provider.

CVE-2026-33260.title: An attacker can send a web request that causes unlimited memory a ...
CVE-2026-33260.description: An attacker can send a web request that causes unlimited memory allocation in the internal web server, leading to a denial of service. The internal web server is disabled by default.

CVE-2026-33261.title: A zone transition from NSEC to NSEC3 might trigger an internal in ...
CVE-2026-33261.description: A zone transition from NSEC to NSEC3 might trigger an internal inconsistency and cause a denial of service.

CVE-2026-33262.title: An attacker can send replies that result in a null pointer derefe ...
CVE-2026-33262.description: An attacker can send replies that result in a null pointer dereference, caused by a missing consistency check and leading to a denial of service. Cookies are disabled by default.

CVE-2026-33600.title: An RPZ sent by a malicious authoritative server can result in a n ...
CVE-2026-33600.description: An RPZ sent by a malicious authoritative server can result in a null pointer dereference, caused by a missing consistency check and leading to a denial of service.

CVE-2026-33601.title: If you use the zoneToCache function with a malicious authoritativ ...
CVE-2026-33601.description: If you use the zoneToCache function with a malicious authoritative server, an attacker can send a zone that result in a null pointer dereference, caused by a missing consistency check and leading to a denial of service.

CVE-2026-33612.title: A malicious authoritative server can send a crafted zone via the  ...
CVE-2026-33612.description: A malicious authoritative server can send a crafted zone via the ZoneToCache function that leads to cache poisoning.

CVE-2026-40012.title: ECS zero scoped answers are stored in the packet cache while they ...
CVE-2026-40012.description: ECS zero scoped answers are stored in the packet cache while they should not. This impacts only configurations that have ECS enabled;

CVE-2026-42387.title: A malicious authoritative server can send a crafted zone via the  ...
CVE-2026-42387.description: A malicious authoritative server can send a crafted zone via the ZoneToCache function that leads to a crash of the Recursor due to insuffcient input validation.

CVE-2026-42388.description: Incomplete validation of the SOA record present in a catalog zone might lead to a crash.

CVE-2026-42389.description: This fix provides extra hardening for the 5.4.x branch by doing extra validation of incoming answers from authoritative servers.

CVE-2026-42390.title: An invalid zone might pass ZONEMD validation while it should not. ...
CVE-2026-42390.description: An invalid zone might pass ZONEMD validation while it should not. This is only relevant if ZoneToCache is configured with ZONEMD validation.

CVE-2026-52690.title: Spoofing replies to Recursor might mark an IP of an authoritative ...
CVE-2026-52690.description: Spoofing replies to Recursor might mark an IP of an authoritative server as not supporting EDNS, causing valdiation of DNSSEC records served by that server to fail.
